# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- User prefers very simple, deterministic implementations ('simple stupid') over complex orchestration for polling logic.
- When modifying code, prefer simple deterministic implementations and avoid changing or breaking existing classes and functions by inserting new functions; preserve existing structure.
- Save the current chat and workspace discussion to continue after restarting the IDE (user confirmed with 'ja').
- Always run the build repeatedly until there are no compilation errors (automatically rebuild until no errors).
